title: HOMESmith Heavy Duty Butterfly Washing Up Sponge Scourers ( Pack of 4 ), Yellow & Blue
features: ▶ HOMESmith SPONGE SCOURERS: Keep your dishes sparkling clean with this dual sided sponge scourer
▶ Smart Cleaning Pads: Water is Enough in most cases — No need for sprays, pastes, or powders. Just activate our premium microfiber Pad with the cleaning power of water and safe the environment.

▶ VERSATILE: In the home, perfect to remove dirt and grease from the dishes, pot, pans, oven trays and racks, kitchen worktops, sinks and baths. Outdoors use the scourer to clean a barbecue grill and garden furniture
▶ Easy & Quick Cleaning - High density sponge has delicate soft handle, high foaming rate, easy rinse, porous fibre structure and durability.
▶ What’s included? Pack of 4 Colourful absorbent high density cleaning and washing shaped sponge pads.
description: Efficient and super absorbent Biodegradable cellulose sponge Scouring side made from 100% recycled fibres Specially contoured to clean hard to reach areas, Versatile HOMESmith Spongy Heavy Duty Scourers are super absorbent and supple. The sponge is ideal for wiping down surfaces and mopping up spills whilst the scouring side is efficient for all your daily washing up.
